message:
fix(renderer): emit cursor home before diff rendering

Adds explicit cursor home escape sequence (\x1b[H]) at the start of
diff rendering in both standard and threaded renderers.

Problem:
The AnsiWriter internally tracks cursor position starting at (0,0),
but the actual terminal cursor may be at a different position from
the previous frame. This caused relative cursor moves to be calculated
incorrectly, leading to visual glitches and misaligned rendering.

Solution:
Before emitting any cell updates, send cursor home to synchronize
the terminal cursor with the writer's internal (0,0) tracking origin.
This ensures subsequent relative moves are calculated correctly.

Files changed:
- src/renderer/mod.rs: Add cursor home in render_diff()
- src/renderer/threaded.rs: Add cursor home in threaded render_diff()

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
